narrative:
Miamisburg 2-C (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,161 registered voters, with 59.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.7 percentage points.
